feed.title: IndieWebClub Bangalore Week Notes Blogroll
feed.subtitle: Week Notes by IndieWebClub Bangalore folks

entry.title: Weekly Notes 24/2026
entry.summary: @thej@social.thej.in: «I am at IITM/Chennai for Paradox. I have been here since 2022, since the first Paradox. The fest and the crowd have grown bigger. I came by car with friends A&S. We took Old Madras Road and stopped…»

entry.summary: «Greetings from Singapore. This is a very late weeknote for a very busy week from a very sick Nim.»

entry.title: week notes, October 17 2024
entry.summary: «I went to The Jukebox, Koramangala with my flatmate and AP. We got some Toit Stouts, and remarked that they were diluted. It had just drizzled outside. I looked out of the window and thought, "hmm,…»

entry.summary: «I tried Dirty Matcha for the first time. I saw that it's a new summer addition in the Blue Tokai menu, and also the most expensive item on the menu. I asked for a Dirty Matcha, and I got a dirty look…»

entry.summary: «Hello, welcome to my first weeknote. I feel tired in a good way and I have been working so much that I never even had the chance to sit in melancholy by the window and watch the first pre-monsoon…»

entry.title: Weekly Notes - Week 1 - Zero banana-liking dogs found
entry.summary: «I’ve started writing weekly notes after being inspired by Ankur, Tanvi, and Abhinav at my first-ever IndieWeb Club meetup in Bangalore a few weeks ago. While I won’t be able to share updates about my…»

entry.title: Weeknotes: Week 1 Post-retreat life
entry.summary: «I am writing Weeknotes as part of the Indiewebclub #11 prompt. The week was full of learnings : ) [Friday] We celebrated a friend’s birthday, one of the gifts was a printed tee, and I was happy using…»

entry.title: Weeknote: 04 October 2025
entry.summary: «My personal celebration this week is that I did released the OCaml handlebars templating library that I was working on. I felt happy when I read the "Thanks" and "Your PR ... has been merged" emails…»
